transcript: Speaker A: Ma'am you need to fill the KYC application form with your domicile proof and submit with your self-attested Xerox. Speaker B: Dada, Marathi madhe sang na re. [Brother, tell me in Marathi.] Speaker A: Ma'am, it's ma... it's mandatory documentation and... Speaker B: Dada tu Marathi aahes na, mag English madhe kashala? [Brother, you are Marathi, right? Then why in English?] Speaker A: Ho pan... [Yes, but...] Speaker C: Pramod, SpeakX vapar re. Tula simple English madhe bolayla shikavto. [Pramod, use SpeakX. It teaches you to speak in simple English.] Speaker A: Kay? Simple English? [What? Simple English?] Speaker C: Je customers la pan kalel. Are ho, real conversations practice karavto. Pronunciation, clarity... [Which customers will also understand. Yes, it makes you practice real conversations. Pronunciation, clarity...] Speaker A: Sangtos kay! [Really!] Speaker C: Daily fakt 15 minutes. [Daily just 15 minutes.] Speaker A: Accha, tar mi lagech download karto. [Oh, then I will download it immediately.] Speaker A: Tai, please fill your name and address, ani ek photocopy dya, mag jhala. [Sister, please fill your name and address, and give one photocopy, then it's done.] Speaker B: Thank you dada. Tu changla aahes, simple sangtos. [Thank you brother. You are good, you explain simply.] Speaker A: SpeakX, jasta nahi, divsatun 10 te 15 minute. Download kara ani free madhe shika. [SpeakX, not much, just 10 to 15 minutes a day. Download and learn for free.]
on_screen_text: Ma'am you need to fill the KYC application form with your domicile proof and submit with your self-attested Xerox. Dada, Marathi madhe sang na re. Ma'am, it's mandatory documentation. Dada tu marathi ahesh na mag english madhe kashala? ho pan. Pramod, SpeakX. My water is... hot/cold. Her tea... cold. is/am. AMAZING. kay? Simple english? je customer la pan. arey ho. Your Daily Practice Goal. real conversations. pronunciation. clarity. sangtos kay. daily 15 minutes. achha. tar mi lagech. tai please fill your name and address aani ek photocopy mag zala. Thank you dada tu changla aahes simple sangtos. SpeakX. SpeakX - English Speaking App. Install. jasta nahi fakta divasache 10 te 15 minute download kara ani free madhe shika.
summary: A Marathi bank employee feels embarrassed when a customer asks him to speak Marathi instead of complex English. A colleague suggests using SpeakX to practice simple, conversational English. After practicing, he successfully assists the customer in clear English, prompting a CTA to download the app for free.
